meta.title: Oracle Time and Labor Mental Model
meta.sourceStatus: Repository /docs not found. Model populated from user-provided reference diagrams and marked Needs review for docs alignment.
meta.validationNote: TODO: Needs review against markdown files in /docs when available

objects.name: HCM Groups
objects.definition: Grouping context that helps determine the worker's time entry setup.
objects.purpose: Connects workers to relevant time entry profile behavior.
commonMistakes: Worker assigned to the wrong group.
Group setup not aligned with profile expectations.

objects.name: Time Entry Profiles
objects.definition: Controls who enters time and which fields/buttons/layout components appear.
objects.purpose: Shapes the capture experience and links to processing profile behavior.
commonMistakes: Profile not mapped to the right people.

objects.name: Time Processing Profiles
objects.definition: Controls validation, calculation, approval/transfer context, and consumer logic.
objects.purpose: Determines how entered time is processed into transfer-ready outcomes.
commonMistakes: Wrong repeating period or consumer set.
Processing profile does not match time entry profile intent.

objects.name: Validation / Calculation Rules
objects.definition: Rules that validate time and drive calculations such as derived time/premium/overtime.
objects.purpose: Enforces quality and computes process outcomes.

objects.name: Time Consumer Sets
objects.definition: Defines consumer destinations/contexts for processed time.
objects.purpose: Routes processed time to payroll, projects, and other consumers.

objects.name: Time Attributes
objects.definition: Attributes used to classify and structure time entry.
objects.purpose: Feeds time card fields and structure logic.
commonMistakes: Custom attributes not mapped to fields.

objects.name: Time Card Fields
objects.definition: Fields shown to the worker/manager during entry.
objects.purpose: Collects input used by downstream validation and calculations.
commonMistakes: Field setup not aligned with attribute design.

objects.name: Layout Components / Sets
objects.definition: Defines what layout elements, fields, and buttons appear.
objects.purpose: Controls entry UI behavior based on profile context.
commonMistakes: Buttons/fields missing for a use case.

objects.name: Repeating Time Periods
objects.definition: Defines recurring period context for processing.
objects.purpose: Supports processing profile behavior and timing context.
commonMistakes: Period boundaries do not match expected cycles.

objects.name: Consumers
objects.purpose: Uses approved and transfer-ready time for payroll, costing, and integrations.

glossary.definition: The runtime screen or channel where time is submitted.

glossary.term: Plain English: Rules check and compute
glossary.definition: Validation checks whether time is acceptable; calculation derives outcomes.
State indicating time can be consumed by payroll, projects, or external systems.
